name: Escape Waves for Lucky Blocks
description: Move fast and collect Lucky Blocks all around the map! ‍ Survive powerful waves that keep coming one after another! Gradually build your base with Brainrots and stay alive as long as possible! Upgrade your area to place even more Brainrots!
instructions: Run and collect Lucky Blocks Move around the map and collect Lucky Blocks as fast as possible Dodge the waves Dangerous waves come regularly mdash hide run and survive Unlock Brainrots Place Brainrots and progress
